sentences.english: Electric vehicles have gone from a niche product to a mainstream choice in just a decade, with global sales surpassing ten million units in 2024.
Battery technology has improved dramatically, with modern EVs capable of traveling over five hundred kilometers on a single charge.
sentences.korean: 배터리 기술이 극적으로 향상되어 현대 전기차는 한 번 충전으로 500킬로미터 이상 주행할 수 있다.

sentences.english: The biggest challenge remains the charging infrastructure, particularly in rural areas where stations are few and far between.
Several countries have announced plans to ban the sale of new gasoline vehicles by 2035, which will likely accelerate the transition to electric transportation.
sentences.korean: 여러 국가가 2035년까지 신규 가솔린 차량 판매 금지 계획을 발표했다. 이는 전기 교통으로의 전환을 가속화할 것이다.
